project:
4.0.0
wow fashions 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT jar
fashions http://maven.apache.org
UTF-8 7.18.0
org.seleniumhq.selenium selenium-java 4.33.0
io.github.bonigarcia webdrivermanager 5.8.0
io.cucumber cucumber-java ${cucumber.version}
io.cucumber cucumber-testng ${cucumber.version}
org.testng testng 7.9.0
com.aventstack extentreports 5.1.1
org.slf4j slf4j-simple 2.0.13
java
resources
org.apache.maven.plugins maven-compiler-plugin 3.11.0
17 17
org.apache.maven.plugins maven-surefire-plugin 3.2.5
testng.xml
name: Java TestNG CI (Maven)
on: push: branches: [ "main", "master" ] pull_request: branches: [ "main", "master" ]
jobs: test: runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps: # 1. Checkout repository code - name: Checkout code uses: actions/checkout@v4
# 2. Set up JDK 17 (or your required Java version) - name: Set up JDK 17 uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '17' distribution: 'temurin' cache: 'maven'
# 3. Run TestNG tests - name: Run TestNG Tests run: mvn clean test
# 4. Upload Test Reports as Artifacts (runs even if tests fail) - name: Upload TestNG Reports if: always() uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: testng-results-maven path: target/surefire-reports/
